title: Azure OpenAI Added GPT-5-Codex And Sora Video-To-Video Support
summary: Azure OpenAI what's-new notes for September 2025 list GPT-5-Codex availability and Sora video-to-video support, affecting coding-agent model access and video generation workflows on Azure.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Microsoft Learn page reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Check Azure access requirements and routing rules before moving Codex or Sora workloads to these Azure OpenAI model surfaces.

detail.migration_notes: The source notes model access requirements for GPT-5-Codex; APW does not assert account eligibility.

limitations: The source groups these updates under September 2025, so APW uses an approximate month-start event date.
